rules.message: CPU socket does not match motherboard socket.
RAM generation is unsupported by this motherboard.
Storage interface not supported by motherboard.
Firmware is not built for this motherboard.
Insufficient RAM for this operating system.
Total power draw exceeds battery + charging IC capacity.
Wireless module installed without matching antenna path.
Battery voltage mismatch with power management IC.

boot_loop.hint: Check CPU socket and RAM generation compatibility.

blue_screen.symptom: System crashes right after firmware load.

no_display.symptom: Screen stays black even though device powers on.
no_display.hint: Check storage detection and display connector.

overheating.symptom: Temperature rises rapidly and device throttles.
overheating.hint: Add better cooling or reduce CPU/GPU load.

slow_performance.symptom: Apps lag and OS feels sluggish.
slow_performance.hint: Compare OS minimum RAM requirement with installed RAM.

power_drain.hint: Check total component power draw vs battery+charging capacity.

wifi_missing.hint: Check antenna and wireless module installation.

battery_swelling.symptom: Battery appears to swell over time.
battery_swelling.hint: Verify battery voltage matches the power IC rating.

no_charging.symptom: Device does not charge when plugged in.
no_charging.hint: Check charging IC wattage and battery compatibility.

camera_error.hint: Check camera connector and power supply.

no_audio.hint: Check speaker wiring and power IC.

fingerprint_failed.hint: Check sensor wiring and firmware driver.

random_restart.hint: Check power stability and heat levels.

touch_failure.hint: Check display connector and digitizer wiring.
